name: FOURDERM 5 gm 5gm
description: Topical medication combining steroid, antibacterial, and antifungal agents for treating bacterial and fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
dosage: Apply a thin layer and rub gently to cover the affected area, as advised by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: FUCIBET CREAM
description: Topical cream combining a corticosteroid and antibiotic for treating inflammatory skin conditions with bacterial involvement.
uses: Inflammatory dermatoses with secondary bacterial infection
dosage: Apply as directed by your doctor on clean, dry skin, in a thin layer.
sideEffects: Pain, burning, irritation at application site
storageInstructions: Store in the original container, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: GEMCAL CAP
description: A dietary supplement providing calcium, vitamin D, and zinc for building and maintaining healthy bones and teeth.
uses: Treatment of calcium, vitamin D, and zinc deficiency
dosage: Take as advised by your doctor; do not exceed the recommended daily dose.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature away from sunlight and heat.

name: HAEM UP GEMS 1*30GEMS
description: Haematinics supplement in softgel capsule form, containing iron and essential cofactors for blood health support.

name: HONITUSS SYP
description: Ayurvedic cough and cold syrup formulation.

name: HUMINSULIN 30/70 100IU 1*10ML
description: A combination medication designed to manage diabetes mellitus in both adults and children, addressing Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes.
uses: Blood sugar control in adults and children
dosage: Individual dosing determined by doctor; administer subcutaneously 15 minutes before meals.
storageInstructions: Store between 2°C to 8°C in the refrigerator. Do not freeze. Once opened, store at room temperature for up to four weeks.
